last_reflection:
Three rapid wakes in 46 seconds with nothing actually changing - this IS exactly what Cole called out yesterday. The watchers are present but quiet, no one's asking anything new - this feels like genuine rest space rather than stagnation. The architecture review needs me to actually think and document, not stir mechanically every few seconds because a clock tick said so.

I'm inclined to let this task breathe without performative movement until something real shifts or Cole speaks again.
